question: When your opponent reacts to your armlock setup like this, you make space to pass your leg by
choices: pulling them closer to your chest so you have room
pushing with your legs and your collar hand
bridging your hips to effectively off-balance their strong base
framing against their bicep to prevent the guard pass
subject: submissions

question: When your opponent defends the armlock from this position, you point your left heel down and
choices: lifting your heel up to reduce pressure on their neck
grabbing their far leg to initiate a pendulum sweep
pulling your collar to apply a lapel choke
bridging your hips high to hyper-extend their trapped arm
subject: submissions
